title: Leave storage.conf alone
body:
There's a block of code in cirrus setup that seems to have cost people a good chunk of time in #2842:

 https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/d69f76ab1741c834303b9dfc8d03813fe3a59577/contrib/cirrus/lib.sh#L181-L194

#1945 has been closed for over a year. It might be time to remove this workaround.

comments.body: Could you open the PR ad see if it passes tests?
